generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies are quietly reducing their defense commitments while expecting us to bear more of the burden? As someone who values duty and responsibility, it's crucial we strengthen our strategic autonomy. The recent reports show that even our closest partners are cutting back on joint exercises and intelligence sharing. We can't afford to be caught off guard. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
